logging.description: Always use structured logging with logger.ts

errorHandling.description: Wrap risky operations in try/catch with informative messages
errorHandling.example: try { await riskyOperation(); } catch (error) { logger.error('Operation failed:', error); }

costTracking.description: Record LLM usage for cost tracking

riskTags.description: Use the current risk tag format and levels in module headers
riskTags.example: @footnote-risk: medium - Incorrect state handling can break request flow.

ethicsTags.description: Use the current ethics tag format and levels in module headers
ethicsTags.example: @footnote-ethics: high - Incorrect behavior could reduce user trust or transparency.

headerOrder.description: Keep module header tags in required order

avoidAny.description: Avoid 'any' types - use proper TypeScript types
avoidAny.suggestion: Use specific types or generics instead
